# edgenext_ssl_certificate (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cert_id` (String) Certificate ID

### Read-Only

- `bind_domains` (List of String) List of bound domains
- `cert_expire_time` (String) Certificate end time
- `cert_start_time` (String) Certificate start time
- `certificate` (String, Sensitive) Certificate content
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `key` (String, Sensitive) Private key content
- `name` (String) Certificate name
